parameters.query:
WITH tx AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS count, COALESCE(SUM(gross_amount), 0)::numeric(12,2) AS gross_revenue
  FROM automatenlager.sales_transactions
  WHERE source <> 'historic_backfill'
), guv AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('key', concat_ws('|', posting_date::text, m.machine_key, gd.mdb_code::text, p.product_key), 'revenueGross', gd.revenue_gross)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.guv_daily gd
  JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = gd.machine_id
  JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = gd.product_id
  WHERE gd.source <> 'historic_backfill'
), slots AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(concat_ws('|', m.machine_key, sa.mdb_code::text, p.product_key)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.slot_assignments sa
  JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = sa.machine_id
  JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
  WHERE sa.active = TRUE
), aliases AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('alias', pa.alias, 'productKey', p.product_key)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.product_aliases pa
  JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = pa.product_id
), unmapped AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('productNameRaw', product_name_raw, 'nayaxTransactionId', nayax_transaction_id)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.sales_transactions st
  WHERE st.product_id IS NULL
), prices AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('productKey', p.product_key, 'priceGross', pr.sale_price_gross)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.prices pr
  JOIN automatenlager.slot_assignments sa ON sa.slot_assignment_id = pr.slot_assignment_id
  JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
  WHERE pr.valid_to IS NULL
), movement_rows AS (
  SELECT sb.batch_key, COALESCE(SUM(sm.quantity_delta_total), 0) AS movement_total, sb.initial_qty - sb.remaining_qty AS expected_movement_total
  FROM automatenlager.stock_batches sb
  LEFT JOIN automatenlager.stock_movements sm ON sm.batch_id = sb.batch_id
  GROUP BY sb.batch_key, sb.initial_qty, sb.remaining_qty
), movements AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('batchKey', batch_key, 'movementTotal', movement_total, 'expectedMovementTotal', expected_movement_total)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM movement_rows
), backup AS (
  SELECT MAX(created_at) AS last_backup_ok_at
  FROM automatenlager.warnings
  WHERE warning_type = 'BACKUP_OK'
)
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
  'transactions', jsonb_build_object('count', tx.count, 'grossRevenue', tx.gross_revenue),
  'guvDaily', guv.rows,
  'activeSlots', slots.rows,
  'productAliases', aliases.rows,
  'unmappedSales', unmapped.rows,
  'prices', prices.rows,
  'stockMovements', movements.rows,
  'lastBackupOkAt', backup.last_backup_ok_at
) AS postgres_snapshot
FROM tx, guv, slots, aliases, unmapped, prices, movements, backup;

parameters.jsCode:
const events = $json.warningEvents || [];
return events.map(event => ({ json: event }));

parameters.query:
WITH tx AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS count, COALESCE(SUM(gross_amount), 0)::numeric(12,2) AS gross_revenue
  FROM automatenlager.sales_transactions
  WHERE source <> 'historic_backfill'
), guv AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('key', concat_ws('|', posting_date::text, m.machine_key, gd.mdb_code::text, p.product_key), 'revenueGross', gd.revenue_gross)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.guv_daily gd
  JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = gd.machine_id
  JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = gd.product_id
  WHERE gd.source <> 'historic_backfill'
), slots AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(concat_ws('|', m.machine_key, sa.mdb_code::text, p.product_key)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.slot_assignments sa
  JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = sa.machine_id
  JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
  WHERE sa.active = TRUE
), aliases AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('alias', pa.alias, 'productKey', p.product_key)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.product_aliases pa
  JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = pa.product_id
), unmapped AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('productNameRaw', product_name_raw, 'nayaxTransactionId', nayax_transaction_id)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.sales_transactions st
  WHERE st.product_id IS NULL
), prices AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('productKey', p.product_key, 'priceGross', pr.sale_price_gross)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM automatenlager.prices pr
  JOIN automatenlager.slot_assignments sa ON sa.slot_assignment_id = pr.slot_assignment_id
  JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
  WHERE pr.valid_to IS NULL
), movement_rows AS (
  SELECT sb.batch_key, COALESCE(SUM(sm.quantity_delta_total), 0) AS movement_total, sb.initial_qty - sb.remaining_qty AS expected_movement_total
  FROM automatenlager.stock_batches sb
  LEFT JOIN automatenlager.stock_movements sm ON sm.batch_id = sb.batch_id
  GROUP BY sb.batch_key, sb.initial_qty, sb.remaining_qty
), movements AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('batchKey', batch_key, 'movementTotal', movement_total, 'expectedMovementTotal', expected_movement_total)), '[]'::jsonb) AS rows
  FROM movement_rows
), backup AS (
  SELECT MAX(created_at) AS last_backup_ok_at
  FROM automatenlager.warnings
  WHERE warning_type = 'BACKUP_OK'
)
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
  'transactions', jsonb_build_object('count', tx.count, 'grossRevenue', tx.gross_revenue),
  'guvDaily', guv.rows,
  'activeSlots', slots.rows,
  'productAliases', aliases.rows,
  'unmappedSales', unmapped.rows,
  'prices', prices.rows,
  'stockMovements', movements.rows,
  'lastBackupOkAt', backup.last_backup_ok_at
) AS postgres_snapshot
FROM tx, guv, slots, aliases, unmapped, prices, movements, backup;
